headline: Retired Senior Policy Analyst, U.S. Department of the Interior | Environmental Regulation & Land-Management Policy
summary: Retired GS-14 senior policy analyst with the U.S. Department of the Interior (1982-2017), specializing in environmental regulation and public land-management policy. M.P.A., Severn Graduate School. Now a guest lecturer on environmental policy at Bayview Community College, a GED tutor at the Annapolis Library, and a frequent contributor of letters and op-eds to the Capital Gazette on land, water, and conservation policy.
